# Release to Main Branch

## Changelog

<!-- List the key changes in this release -->

## Pre-Release Checklist

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

-   [ ] All tests are passing on the `dev` branch
-   [ ] Documentation has been updated to reflect all changes
-   [ ] Version numbers have been updated in relevant files
-   [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated
-   [ ] Release has been tested on all target platforms
-   [ ] All GitHub issues addressed by this release have been closed or updated

## Post-Release Tasks

<!-- Mark the appropriate option with an "x" -->

-   [ ] Create a new GitHub release with release notes
-   [ ] Tag the release in git
-   [ ] Notify the community about the new release
-   [ ] Update the project roadmap if necessary

<!-- Any other information that is important to this release -->
